attempt_records.history_entry: 【✅ Perfect Adsorption】 ontop @ ['Ti'] (Index [4]) -> ⚠️【Unstable Site Warning】⚠️: Planned ontop (Ti) is unstable, adsorbate spontaneously slipped to hollow (FCC/No-Subsurf) (Ti-Ti-Ti-Ti).This means Ti has insufficient affinity for this adsorbate. Please **FORBID** testing Ti type sites again! [🌟 New Best] | E=-11.652 eV

plan.reasoning: History shows ontop Ti slipped to hollow Ti-Ti-Ti-Ti (E=-11.652 eV), proving all Ti-based sites unstable; therefore Ti sites are permanently forbidden. SMILES CN(C)N=O is consistent with a closed-shell molecule (no radicals). Best remaining option is ontop Bi using the O lone pair (index 4). This satisfies Molecule rules and uses only allowed Bi sites.
